name: lzss

evidence.cross_references: wad.c (entry via lzhuf_start), huffman.c (all Huffman functions)

summary: LZSS decompression with adaptive Huffman entropy coding. Sliding window N=4096, max match F=60, threshold=2. Double-buffered DMA streaming from ROM for zero-stall decompression. Entry point lzhuf_start called from wad.c during WAD file extraction.

functions.name: lzhuf_decode_symbol
functions.summary: Decode one Huffman symbol: traverse tree from root (sHufMap[R]), reading bits via lzhuf_read_bit, following left(0)/right(1) child pointers. When leaf reached (c >= T), returns c - T (0..NUM_SYMBOLS-1). Calls lzhuf_tree_update to maintain adaptive tree.

functions.name: lzhuf_decode_distance
functions.summary: Decode LZSS match distance: reads 8-bit Huffman code via lzhuf_read_byte_bits, looks up sDistBase[i]<<6 (base) and sDistExtra[i] (extra bits), reads extra bits via lzhuf_read_bits, combines result masked to 6 bits (& 0x3f).

functions.name: lzhuf_decompress
functions.summary: Main LZSS decompress loop: calls lzhuf_tree_init, fills sliding window with spaces (N-F bytes). Loops through compressed data: for literal (c < 256), copy byte to output and window. For match (c >= 256), decode distance + length (c-255+THRESHOLD), copy from window to output.

functions.name: lzhuf_start
functions.summary: Entry point for LZSS+Huffman decompression. Takes resource context (x_80d298c9), sets up double-buffered DMA: calculates chunk size from heap size, allocates two DMA buffers, starts synchronous + asynchronous DMA reads. Calls lzhuf_decompress. Called from wad.c:531.

globals.D_8013C208: Heap base address (from memory.c, used for DMA buffer allocation)
globals.D_8013C218: Heap size (from memory.c, used to compute chunk size)

open_questions: D_8013C208 and D_8013C218 are declared in variables.h but need meaningful names (Wave 2+).
